REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, PLAINTIFF LISA COLE'S MOTION TO COMPEL THE PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, VERIFIED RESPONSES TO DISCOVERY, ANSWERS TO DEPOSITION QUESTIONS AND OTHER DISCOVERY AND REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART WITH MODIFICATIONS PER AGREEMENT OF COUNSEL. MOTION IS GRANTED AS FOLLOWS: (1) BY JUNE 29, 2016 DEFENDANT LEYDA HIJAZI SHALL SUPPLEMENT RFPD NOS. 9, 12-14, 26, AND 30 TO STATE THAT A THOROUGH SEARCH HAS BEEN MADE AND ALL RESPONSIVE DOCUMENTS HAVE BEEN PRODUCED; (2) BY JUNE 29, 2016 DEFENDANT LEYDA HIJAZI SHALL SUPPLEMENT RFPD NO. 48 AND PRODUCE ANY INSPECTION OR DISCLOSURE REAL ESTATE DOCUMENTS FROM THE DATE DEFENDANTS PURCHASED THE PROPERTY THROUGH THE DATE ESCROW CLOSED. ANY SENSITIVE FINANCIAL INFORMATION MAY BE REDACTED; (3) DEFENDANT LEYDA HIJAZI SHALL ANSWER THE QUESTIONS SHE WAS INSTRUCTED NOT TO ANSWER AT THE DEPOSITION. PLAINTIFF SHALL HAVE TWO ADDITIONAL HOURS OF EXAMINATION TIME FOR MS. HIJAZI. DEPOSITION TO OCCUR NO LATER THAN JULY 15, 2016 UNLESS MUTUALLY AGREED ON A DIFFERENT DATE. MOTION IS DENIED AS FOLLOWS: (1) MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO THE RFA'S; AND (2) REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS DENIED. COUNSEL TO SUBMIT A STIPULATION WITH THE AGREED MODIFICATIONS TO THE COURT. JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (501)

Amended Expedited Petition To Approve Compromise Of Disputed Claim Of Minor
Off Calendar Oct-25-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for a Hearing on a Minor's Compromise.
Department 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok. Proceedings reported by: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Kenneth Greenstein, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff/Petitioner: Lisa Cole, mother and guardian ad litem for Minor: Galileo Jeffrey Cole not present in court.
Petitioner sworn and examined.

After testimony and consideration of the evidence presented, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved as follows:
Total Settlement: $3000.00
Attorney's Fees: $750.00 payable to Law Firm of Greenstein & McDonald,
Costs: $0.00
A net balance of $2250.00 to be deposited into a blocked account at:
Bank of America Financial Center, Lakeshore Plaza Branch, 1515 Sloat Blvd, San Francisco, CA 94132 until Minor reaches the age of 18 years.

Court granted Petitioner's Oral Motion to Amend Petition correcting Item 20(a) to 20(b)(2).
Court signed Order Granting approval of Minor and Order to Deposit Money into blocked Account.
Status Hearing scheduled on 1/19/2017 at 9:00 AM, in Department 514 for filing of receipt for the deposit of money into blocked account.
No appearance is required if the receipt is filed and courtesy copy lodged with Dept. 514 prior to Hearing.

Plaintiff Lisa Cole'S Motion To Compel The Production Of Documents, Verified Responses To Discovery, Answers To Deposition Questions And Other Discovery And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jun-15-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
John Belisle, (415)981-5411 for Defendnat/Opposing party Leyda Hijazi.

John Belisle counsel for the Defenant informs the Court that he wishes to contest the tentative ruling. Counsel specifically wishes the limit questions that the defendant is ordered to answer at the deposition regarding other tenants. The Court orders counsel to call Plaintiff's counsel to confer regarding limits on deposition questions. at 10:21 am Mr. Belisle informs the Court that he spoke to Plaintiff's counsel. Counsel for both parties agree to limit questions during the deposition. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: Plaintiff Lisa Cole'S Motion To Compel The Production Of Documents, Verified Responses To Discovery, Answers To Deposition Questions And Other Discovery And Request For Sanctions Granted in part and Denied in part with modifications per agreement of counsel.

Motion is GRANTED as follows: (1) By June 29, 2016 Defendant Leyda Hijazi shall supplement RFPD Nos. 9, 12-14, 26, and 30 to state that a thorough search has been made and all responsive documents have been produced; (2) by June 29, 2016 Defendant Leyda Hijazi shall supplement RFPD No. 48 and produce any inspection or disclosure real estate documents from the date Defendants purchased the property through the date escrow closed. Any sensitive financial information may be redacted; (3) Defendant Leyda Hijazi shall answer the questions she was instructed not to answer at the deposition. Plaintiff shall have two additional hours of examination time for Ms. Hijazi. Deposition to occur no later than July 15, 2016 unless mutually agreed on a different date.
Motion is DENIED as follows: (1) motion to compel further responses to the RFA's; and (2) Request for sanctions is denied. Counsel to submit a stipulation with the agreed modifications to the Court. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)
